title: hutera longirostra
intro: Hutera longirostra, also known as the 'Long-beaked Broomrape', is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hutera longirostra include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the digestion process. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
